title: Mapping Schema
description: Schema for style_map.json and replace_range.json — the LLM's mapping decisions. These are SMALL (< 5KB), never containing content blocks.

style_map.description: Mapping from markdown heading levels to DOCX style_ids. LLM decides this from inspection data.

body.description: DOCX style_id for body text paragraphs.

caption.description: DOCX style_id for captions (if available in template).

preserve_zones.description: Template zones that must NOT be removed.

replace_range.description: Defines where to insert content and what to remove in the template.

insert_after_path.description: paraId-based anchor path for the first insert op. Format: /body/p[@paraId=XXXX].

remove_paths.description: ALL body placeholder paths to remove. No truncation — every non-front-matter placeholder must be here.

remove_rule.description: Policy description for which placeholders to remove.

preserve_zones.description: Template zones that must NOT be removed.
